---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve SQA-Multitools
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open SQA-Multitools
2. Select Plugin '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots/Videos**
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings (using our own Screen Recorder plugin!) to help explain your problem.

**Environment Details:**
 - OS Version: [e.g. Windows 11]
 - App Version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
 - Plugin: [e.g. Screen Recorder, Screenshot, etc.]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific file types, monitor resolution, etc.).
